class.name: linux_i2c_ros2_control/Bmi160SensorHardware
class.description: ros2_control SensorInterface for the Bosch BMI160 6-axis IMU over I2C. Exposes the standard 10 IMU state interfaces consumed by imu_sensor_broadcaster (orientation x/y/z/w, angular_velocity x/y/z, linear_acceleration x/y/z). Orientation is fixed at identity since the BMI160 has no on-chip fusion.
